title: Tough As Nails: Nail Polish
description: Retextures Tough As Nails' water canteens to be more inline with Mojang's modern texturing style.
body:
A resource pack for the [Tough As Nails](https://modrinth.com/mod/tough-as-nails) mod.

Retextures Tough As Nails' water canteens to be more inline with Mojang's modern texturing style.

![Leather, Copper, Iron, Gold, Diamond, and Netherite water canteens](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2d5f93d8d330b0f822b1e21f81e409770a8ce677.jpeg)

You're fully allowed to include this in a modpack! No need to ask for permission.

Not affiliated with [Tough As Nails](https://modrinth.com/mod/tough-as-nails) or its creators, I just thought it'd be something fun to do!
